title: The Revolt and Killing of al-Husayn b. 'Ali
description: It has been mentioned from Muhammad b. Musi al-Khwirazmi56 that he related: Between al-Mahdi's death and al-Hadi 's assump5 a. Ibn al-Athir, VI, 89; Vajda, 186-7; Moscati, Le califat dal-Hddi 7-8; Omar, in 'Abbasiyydt, 91. Tabari-Bal'ami, tr. N, 447 - 53, devotes & lengthy, special section to zandaqah under al-H!&, with many novel details. 53. See on Windidhurmuz and his reign in Tabaristin, Ibn Isfandiyir, Ta'rlkh-i Tabaristdn, tr. E. G. Browne, 125-32; Moscati, "Studi storici sul califatto di alMahdi," 347-50; idem, "Le califat dal-H!&," 8-9; W.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
